# Emily UI Build Status

```bash
node docs/generate-build-status.js
```

## Blocked items, grouped by reason

### needs-js (21)

| Name | Layer | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Address lookup input | atom | Requires lookup service + combobox pattern (aria-expanded, listbox). Plain address fields work today. |
| Drag-and-drop upload | atom | Drop zone requires JS and a keyboard-equivalent fallback input. |
| Quantity stepper | atom | Increment/decrement buttons need JS wiring to the number input. |
| Tooltip trigger/base | atom | Hover/focus/escape handling + aria-describedby wiring required. |
| Toast base | atom | Live region politeness, timing, dismissal and focus rules need JS + review. |
| Address lookup row | molecule | — |
| File upload with preview | molecule | — |
| Image upload with preview | molecule | — |
| Accordion item | molecule | Moved from needs-a11y-review: the ARIA accordion pattern (button + aria-expanded + region) cannot work without JS. For no-JS disclosure use the built FAQ item (native details/summary). |
| Tab item | molecule | Roving tabindex + aria-selected required. |
| Cookie notice banner | molecule | Consent state, focus handling, and persistence need JS. |
| Back-to-top button | molecule | — |
| Header with services dropdown | organism | Disclosure pattern: button + aria-expanded, escape to close. |
| Header with areas dropdown | organism | — |
| Header with mega menu | organism | Keyboard traversal and escape behaviour need careful review. |
| Mobile drawer menu | organism | Focus trap, escape, inert background. |
| Multi-step quote form | organism | — |
| Photo-upload quote form | organism | — |
| Testimonials carousel | organism | Prefer grid; carousels need pause/controls/reduced-motion handling. |
| Lightbox gallery | organism | Dialog semantics, focus trap, escape. |
| Before/after slider | organism | Needs keyboard-operable handle; static before/after images work today. |

### needs-a11y-review (5)

| Name | Layer | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Transparent-over-hero header | organism | Stays needs-a11y-review: text-over-image contrast cannot be verified statically — must be checked per real image, plus scroll/contrast fallback decision. |
| Full-bleed image hero | organism | Stays needs-a11y-review: same per-image contrast problem; needs a tested overlay/scrim treatment before an example ships. |
| Comparison table | organism | Stays needs-a11y-review: needs real content in a caption + th[scope] table inside .scroll-area, tested on mobile and with AT before an example ships. Card-based comparison (packages) is the built alternative. |
| FAQ accordion | organism | Static review passed: native details/summary, no ARIA, keyboard native, names from summary text. Stays needs-a11y-review pending the manual AT test in docs/accessibility/faq-accordion-manual-test.md — no markup changes expected. |
| FAQ page | template | Static review passed; gated on the same manual AT test as the FAQ accordion: docs/accessibility/faq-accordion-manual-test.md. |

### planned (13)

| Name | Layer | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Tertiary button | atom | Decide whether ghost covers the third rank or a distinct treatment is needed. |
| Compact mobile header | organism | — |
| Sticky CTA rail | organism | — |
| Review wall | organism | — |
| Booking page | template | Blocked on the booking/availability widget (deferred — external booking data). |
| Grant/funding-led microsite starter | page | Stays planned: template exists (grant landing page); microsite scope (multi-page) worth a product decision on structure first. |
| Health/wellness starter | page | — |
| Hospitality/venue starter | page | — |
| Small ecommerce/product starter | page | Stays planned: cart/checkout needs JS and a payment decision — out of scope for the static starter layer. |
| Consultant/freelancer starter | page | — |
| Membership/community starter | page | Stays planned: member login/gating needs a backend decision. |
| Event starter | page | — |
| Course/workshop starter | page | — |

### deferred (5)

| Name | Layer | Why |
|---|---|---|
| Open Graph image template | atom | Tooling/asset concern, not an HTML/CSS atom. Revisit with SEO helpers. |
| Booking/availability widget | organism | Depends on external booking data — out of scope for the CSS/HTML system for now. |
| Quote estimate/result panel | organism | Depends on calculator logic. |
| Google reviews embed pattern | organism | Third-party embed; document integration rather than own it. |
| Map/location section | organism | Third-party map embed; document integration pattern later. |
